zh.lifeSummary: Cicely Grindham是'Simon Grindham "alias Grondyham"和Mrs Simon Grindham的女兒，於1278年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治。她和Philip Nebaud至少有2個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1327年享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Grindham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greenham
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Greenham, one in Ashbrittle (Somerset), the other in Berkshire. The one in Somerset is named with an uncertain element, perhaps an Old English stream name Grinde ‘grinding one’, + hamm ‘water meadow’. The one in Berkshire was named in Old English with grēne ‘green’ + hamm ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

en.lifeSummary: Cicely Grindham was born in 1278, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of 'Simon Grindham "alias Grondyham" and Mrs Simon Grindham. She had at least 2 sons and 7 daughters with Philip Nebaud. She died in 1327, at the age of 49.

ja.lifeSummary: Cicely Grindhamは1278年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトヒントン スト ジョーッジで'Simon Grindham "alias Grondyham"とMrs Simon Grindhamの娘として生まれた。彼女はPhilip Nebaudとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1327年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Grindham(은)는 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 'Simon Grindham "alias Grondyham"(와)과 Mrs Simon Grindham의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Philip Nebaud(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Cicely Grindham родилась в 1278 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали 'Simon Grindham "alias Grondyham" и Mrs Simon Grindham. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей от Philip Nebaud. Она умерла в 1327 г. в возрасте 49 лет.
